title: 'No LPG Shortage In Delhi; Supply Stable And Under Control': CM Rekha Gupta
description: To facilitate access, a dedicated control room of the Food and Civil Supplies Department is operational. Commercial consumers facing any difficulty in obtaining LPG cylinders can contact 011-23379836 or 8383824659 between 9:00 am and 7:00 pm on any day of the week.
